commands.review_summary:
The PR replaces unbounded JSON reads in npm update-check, MiniMax OAuth authorization, and docs search with bounded readers and adds oversized-response tests.

PR surface: Source +17, Tests +83. Total +100 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for source-level reproduction: origin/main still shows unbounded `res.json()` success paths in update-check and MiniMax OAuth authorization. I did not run a memory-pressure repro against a real oversized endpoint.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human/contributor follow-up is needed for rebase, cap acceptance, and real behavior proof; there is no discrete line-level code defect for an automated repair pass.

target.title: fix: bound JSON response reads to prevent OOM in update-check, minimax oauth, and docs search
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Three unbounded `response.json()` calls can buffer arbitrarily large HTTP responses into memory:

1. **NPM registry** (`src/infra/update-check.ts`) — `openclaw/latest` metadata includes all versions, can be very large
2. **MiniMax OAuth authorization** (`extensions/minimax/oauth.ts`) — success path unbounded while error path already uses `readResponseTextLimited`
3. **Docs search** (`src/commands/docs.ts`) — search API response unbounded

## Why This Change Was Made

Each fix follows the established bounded-reader pattern used in recent OOM fixes (#97706, #97808, #98191):
- Use `readResponseWithLimit` / `readProviderJsonResponse` with explicit byte caps
- Add oversized-response rejection tests

## User Impact

- Oversized NPM registry, MiniMax OAuth, and docs search responses are now cancelled mid-stream
- Error messages change slightly for oversized responses

## Evidence

### Test Results
```
src/infra/update-check.test.ts — 20 passed (1 new oversized test)
extensions/minimax/oauth.test.ts — 13 passed (1 new oversized test)
src/commands/docs.test.ts — 4 passed (1 new oversized test)
```

### Files Changed
| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `src/infra/update-check.ts` | `readResponseWithLimit` (4 MiB) for NPM registry |
| `extensions/minimax/oauth.ts` | `readProviderJsonResponse` (16 MiB) for authorization |
| `src/commands/docs.ts` | `readResponseWithLimit` (8 MiB) for docs search |

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
